name: BusinessBotRights
description: Represents the rights of a business bot.

fields.name: can_reply
fields.description: True, if the bot can send and edit messages in the private chats that had incoming messages in the last 24 hours

fields.name: can_read_messages
fields.description: True, if the bot can mark incoming private messages as read

fields.name: can_delete_sent_messages
fields.description: True, if the bot can delete messages sent by the bot

fields.name: can_delete_all_messages
fields.description: True, if the bot can delete all private messages in managed chats

fields.name: can_edit_name
fields.description: True, if the bot can edit the first and last name of the business account

fields.name: can_edit_bio
fields.description: True, if the bot can edit the bio of the business account

fields.name: can_edit_profile_photo
fields.description: True, if the bot can edit the profile photo of the business account

fields.name: can_edit_username
fields.description: True, if the bot can edit the username of the business account

fields.name: can_change_gift_settings
fields.description: True, if the bot can change the privacy settings pertaining to gifts for the business account

fields.name: can_view_gifts_and_stars
fields.description: True, if the bot can view gifts and the amount of Telegram Stars owned by the business account

fields.name: can_convert_gifts_to_stars
fields.description: True, if the bot can convert regular gifts owned by the business account to Telegram Stars

fields.name: can_transfer_and_upgrade_gifts
fields.description: True, if the bot can transfer and upgrade gifts owned by the business account

fields.name: can_transfer_stars
fields.description: True, if the bot can transfer Telegram Stars received by the business account to its own account, or use them to upgrade and transfer gifts

fields.name: can_manage_stories
fields.description: True, if the bot can post, edit and delete stories on behalf of the business account
